# SparseNeuroVec { #neuroim.SparseNeuroVec }

```python
SparseNeuroVec(data, space, mask, label='')
```

Sparse 4D neuroimaging vector.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type                                                   | Description                             | Default    |
|--------|--------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------|------------|
| data   | [np](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`)               | 2D array (time x masked_voxels)         | _required_ |
| space  | [NeuroSpace](`neuroim.neuro_space.NeuroSpace`)         | 4D spatial metadata                     | _required_ |
| mask   | [LogicalNeuroVol](`neuroim.neuro_vol.LogicalNeuroVol`) | Mask defining which voxels are included | _required_ |
| label  | [str](`str`)                                           | Vector label                            | `''`       |

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [as_dense](#neuroim.SparseNeuroVec.as_dense) | Deprecated alias for :meth:`to_dense`. |
| [as_sparse](#neuroim.SparseNeuroVec.as_sparse) | Deprecated alias for :meth:`to_sparse`. |
| [concat](#neuroim.SparseNeuroVec.concat) | Concatenate multiple SparseNeuroVecs along time dimension. |
| [series](#neuroim.SparseNeuroVec.series) | Deprecated dispatcher for voxel time-series extraction. |
| [sub_vector](#neuroim.SparseNeuroVec.sub_vector) | Deprecated alias for :meth:`subvolumes`. |

### as_dense { #neuroim.SparseNeuroVec.as_dense }

```python
SparseNeuroVec.as_dense()
```

Deprecated alias for :meth:`to_dense`.

### as_sparse { #neuroim.SparseNeuroVec.as_sparse }

```python
SparseNeuroVec.as_sparse(mask=None)
```

Deprecated alias for :meth:`to_sparse`.

### concat { #neuroim.SparseNeuroVec.concat }

```python
SparseNeuroVec.concat(*others)
```

Concatenate multiple SparseNeuroVecs along time dimension.

### series { #neuroim.SparseNeuroVec.series }

```python
SparseNeuroVec.series(x, y=None, z=None)
```

Deprecated dispatcher for voxel time-series extraction.

### sub_vector { #neuroim.SparseNeuroVec.sub_vector }

```python
SparseNeuroVec.sub_vector(indices)
```

Deprecated alias for :meth:`subvolumes`.
